## Summary

Describe the requested feature.

## User Need

Who needs this and what problem does it solve?

## Proposed Workflow

Describe the expected user flow, API behavior, report output, or configuration change.

## Affected Area

- Assessment
- CQI
- Performance Monitoring
- Certification
- State/District/Block Monitoring
- Reports
- Admin/Profile
- Documentation
- Other:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Data / Privacy Considerations

Does this feature read, store, export, or display user/facility/health data?

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or related issues if available.
